title: Elaphoglossum obliquatum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum obliquatum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta, and its genus, Elaphoglossum, is part of the order Polypodiales. The family Polypodiaceae is a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. Elaphoglossum obliquatum is native to tropical regions, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. This species of fern is an important part of the plant diversity in its native habitat.
